h2d800decg3641g45f8ga9f6g7967bc0992da: I was blind not to see it. Too trusting. A fool.
h4db9103dgece1g4d70gbeeagb0ef74e44610: Not a fool. A friend. Would that I'd realised it...
h91fdbc99ge030g4599g827agd5b692e67562: The first letter from Cloakwood came a season ago.
ha2edb779g8460g4b3ag9eefg1b3dd06013a1: But when Halsin departed... the shadows truly took root.
h2786dd2cgb7d4g4f4bgbb32g2a79e34e2144: I should have resisted. It should have... been different.
hfa4aac41gb514g41e3g8adfgb8a525f46b84: I see it on your face. You hate me. And I don't blame you.
h31ecc1a3gc0d7g4c79g8650g3b07d57b4bb9: I do not hate you. I am ashamed at how far I let your machinations spread.
h2aad4f1fg0f00g404agb84ag23f28145e600: If it's an argument you seek, you won't find it here.
hb7c2e5c6g74f8g4a29g9519gc42c9f099e12: Whatever the Treefather's judgment, I will accept it in full.
